final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-editorial
Asset type: retro sci-fi magazine cover, 1960s space-age illustration
Primary request: imagined year-2000 lunar colony city life as envisioned in the 1960s
Scene/backdrop: lunar surface with gray barren terrain, a massive transparent geodesic dome enclosing a miniature city, black star-filled cosmos with Earth hanging in the distance
Subject: domed lunar colony with skyscrapers, parks, monorail trains, flying cars inside; astronauts piloting circular flying saucers patrolling outside the dome; Earth visible as blue and white sphere against void
Style/medium: 1960s-70s sci-fi magazine cover illustration, retro-futurism, hard-edged linework, optimistic naive vision of the future
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, dome as central focal point, Earth positioned in upper background, flying saucers in mid-ground
Lighting/mood: dramatic contrast between artificial dome lighting and harsh lunar shadows, cosmic darkness, hopeful and aspirational mood
Color palette: vibrant saturated hues with slight faded/washed quality, retro printing color separation, cyan-magenta-yellow registration feel
Materials/textures: halftone dot pattern texture, newsprint paper grain, vintage offset printing aesthetic, smooth illustration surfaces with hard edges
Constraints: preserve 1960s retro-futuristic aesthetic, maintain naive optimistic tone of the era, keep halftone texture visible
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, modern CGI smoothness, desaturated dystopian palette, contemporary minimalist design
